prompt: Apply the style of 'A Boy and His Atom' from the reference image to the source.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the source image, by applying the visual characteristics and aesthetic of image 2, the reference image. Transform the white dots in image 1 to match the smooth, luminous, and well-defined appearance of the atoms in image 2. Convert the stark black background of image 1 to the soft, uniform grey, and subtly textured background observed in image 2, ensuring a photorealistic, microscopic visual style.
objects: soft, uniform grey, subtly textured background
